description: §19.7 E-TYPE-080 — a `!{}` call-site handler that covers only .NotFound leaves the .Timeout error variant uncovered, firing E-TYPE-080 (non-exhaustive error handler). Asserted AS an error (§34 fatal partition; §34 catalog maps E-TYPE-080 -> §19.7).
rationale: §19.7 / §34: an error handler that does not cover all error variants of the failable call's error enum is non-exhaustive -> E-TYPE-080. LoadError has {NotFound, Timeout}; the handler names only NotFound.
